codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original failing implementation and the follow-up fix. The original failure points are now addressed: dungeon-exclusive set content exists and is wired into loot/set handling, and dungeon exits/save-return paths now use the Abyss Rift entrance coordinates. The remaining random-dungeons implementation matches the feature requirements at code level.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, original failure report, original feature diff, and follow-up fix diff for random-dungeons. The fix adequately resolves the prior blocking issues by adding dungeon-exclusive set support and correcting Abyss Rift entrance return/save behavior, so this review passes.
